title: Request for Written VR&E Decision
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: VR&E Case Manager / VR&E Officer

Subject: Request for Written Decision and Review Rights Notice
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

On {{informalDenialDate}}, I was informed that VR&E would not act on or approve the following issue: {{issueAtStake}}.

The denial or refusal was communicated by: {{whoSaidNo}}.

At this time, I do not have a formal written notice explaining the issue decided, the reasons for the action, the evidence considered, or my review options. The missing notice problem is: {{missingNotice}}.

Please issue a written decision identifying the action taken, the legal basis relied upon, the evidence considered, and the available review options and deadlines.

Respectfully,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
